description: Host-only IDE command dispatch and redisplay frame contract. Hardware wrappers in lib/ide-ui.lisp stay loadable but are not invoked here.

cases.name: step-cx-x-starts-mx
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote ide-event-command) nil) (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-make-buffer "scratch" (list "")))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 120 nil)))) (%ide-mini-status-line)))

cases.name: step-mx-tab-cycles-commands

cases.name: step-cx-cn-cycles-through-stable-buffer-list
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote ide-buffers) nil) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "a" (list "aa"))) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "b" (list "bb"))) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "c" (list "cc"))) (set-symbol-value (quote ide-event-command) nil) (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (%ide-resume-buffer "c"))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 14 nil))) (s3 (ide-step s2 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s4 (ide-step s3 (list (quote key) 14 nil)))) (list (ide-buffer-name (ide-state-buffer s2)) (ide-buffer-name (ide-state-buffer s4)))))

cases.name: step-cx-cp-wraps-to-previous-buffer
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote ide-buffers) nil) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "a" (list "aa"))) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "b" (list "bb"))) (%ide-store-buffer (ide-make-buffer "c" (list "cc"))) (set-symbol-value (quote ide-event-command) nil) (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (%ide-resume-buffer "c"))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 16 nil)))) (list (ide-buffer-name (ide-state-buffer s2)) (ide-state-message s2))))

cases.name: step-ctrl-w-kills-word
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote *ide-kill-ring*) "") (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("ab cd")) 0 3))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 23 nil)))) (list (ide-buffer-lines (ide-state-buffer s1)) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s1)) (symbol-value (quote *ide-kill-ring*)))))

cases.name: step-ctrl-r-backward-kills-word
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote *ide-kill-ring*) "") (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("ab cd")) 0 5))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 18 nil)))) (list (ide-buffer-lines (ide-state-buffer s1)) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s1)) (symbol-value (quote *ide-kill-ring*)))))

cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote ide-buffers) nil) (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-insert-char (ide-make-buffer "scratch" (list "")) 97))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 3 nil)))) (%ide-persist-state (%ide-state-with-message s2 nil)) (ide-buffer-lines (%ide-resume-buffer "scratch"))))

cases.name: step-cx-cx-exchanges-point-and-mark
cases.input: (let* ((b (ide-set-mark (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("ab" "cd")) 0 1))) (s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point b 1 1))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 24 nil)))) (list (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s2)) (ide-buffer-mark (ide-state-buffer s2))))

cases.name: step-cx-cr-kills-multi-line-region

cases.name: step-ctrl-v-pages-down
cases.input: (let* ((s0 (%ide-state-with-render-cache (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("a" "bb" "ccc" "dddd")) 0 1)) nil nil nil 4)) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 22 nil)))) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s1)))

cases.name: step-ctrl-z-pages-up
cases.input: (let* ((s0 (%ide-state-with-render-cache (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("a" "bb" "ccc" "dddd")) 3 3)) nil nil nil 4)) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 26 nil)))) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s1)))

cases.name: step-cx-ca-goes-buffer-start
cases.input: (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("a" "bb")) 1 2))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 1 nil)))) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s2)))

cases.name: step-cx-ce-goes-buffer-end
cases.input: (let* ((s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("a" "bb")) 0 0))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 24 nil))) (s2 (ide-step s1 (list (quote key) 5 nil)))) (ide-buffer-point (ide-state-buffer s2)))

cases.name: status-cache-tracks-line
cases.input: (progn (set-symbol-value (quote ide-status-line) nil) (let* ((b0 (ide-make-buffer "scratch" '("a" "b"))) (s0 (ide-make-state b0)) (s1 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point b0 1 0)))) (and (string-prefix-p "-- scratch L1 --" (%ide-status-cached s0 80)) (string-prefix-p "-- scratch L2 --" (%ide-status-cached s1 80)))))

cases.name: self-insert-wraps-onto-next-line
cases.input: (let* ((line "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx") (s0 (ide-make-state (ide-set-point (ide-make-buffer "scratch" (list line)) 0 79))) (s1 (ide-step s0 (list (quote key) 121 nil)))) (list (ide-line-count (ide-state-buffer s1)) (ide-line-at (ide-state-buffer s1) 1)))
